calendar.matters:
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Apr-10-2006 Off Calendar

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Feb-28-2006 Continued To Apr-21-06 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 212

Request To Have Witness Appear By Declaration & Have Live Testimony Waived At Default Prove-Up Hearing
Off Calendar Mar-07-2006 Text Ruling

Default Prove Up
Off Calendar Mar-07-2006 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled for Default Prove-Up Hearing this day.
Dept. 218, Comm. Sue Kaplan, Clerk: S. Ravinantapricha, CSR: Susan Murphy.
Carolyn Morris, Esq. for Plaintiff: Wells Fargo Bank, N.A.
Order waiving live witness filed and entered on 02-17-06.
After hearing the evidence presented and considering the declaration of Nancy Harms, the Court rules in favor of the Plaintiff and against the Defaulted Defendants: Douglas Mann and Cape Cod Biolab, Inc. as follows:
Damages $84,894.24
Prejudgment Interest $9,614.56
Attorney Fees $1,274.00
Costs $375.50, for a total of $96,158.30
Judgment signed in open court.

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Jan-20-2006 Continued To Mar-10-06 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 212
